rationale: Moving test runner config files to mongodb-test-runner; internal CI/test infrastructure reorganization, no spec behavior.
ChangeStream spec's Resumable Error definition deemed too broad; spec root cause, depends DRIVERS-650 for spec fix.
Internal refactor of Cursor constructor signature to reduce redundancy; no spec behavior change.
Resource leak: MongoCryptD client not cleaned up; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
AutoEncrypter client not using new URL parser; deprecation warning issue, no spec rule violated.
Internal refactor moving cursor session initialization; no spec behavior change.
Description quotes driver-sessions spec rule requiring server selection when not connected; driver skipped this check.
User-reported slow insert/update performance; no spec rule involved.
Spec requires discarding ServerSessions involved in network errors; DRIVERS-649 coordinates fix across drivers.
JavaScript prototype chain collision when database named 'constructor'; language-specific bug, no spec area.
requestId integer overflow in wire message header; implementation bug, no spec rule specifies request ID range.
Cursors bypass error-handling machinery (mark session dirty, clear pool, remove server); violates SDAM/sessions/CMAP error-handling rules.
Change stream removes listeners before closing cursor, preventing 'close' event; Node.js event emission bug, no spec rule.
Internal refactor to use AggregateOperation for aggregation cursors; no spec behavior change.
Staleness calculation mixes nanoseconds and milliseconds; wrong formula breaks secondary/secondaryPreferred selection per server-selection spec.
Dead code removal after command refactor; internal cleanup, no behavior change.
CI task to test MongoDB 4.2 in Evergreen; test infrastructure configuration, no driver behavior.
Memory leak: MongoCrypt binary_t is non-owning view; implementation resource bug, no spec rule violated.
FLE crypto hook errors not propagated back to libmongocrypt; internal error-handling improvement, no spec rule.
Internal refactor adding fullResponse attribute to CommandOperationV2; no spec behavior change.
Transient TypeError on app restart; implementation timing bug, no spec rule involved.
Encryption bindings broken for Node 12; packaging/native build compatibility, no spec area.
crypto.randomFillSync unavailable in Node v4; Node version compatibility fix, no spec area.
readPreference=secondary regression in 3.3.0; operations executed on primary despite spec requiring secondary.
Kerberos module compile errors on Node 12; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior.
JSDoc documentation for mongodb-client-encryption; docs task, no spec behavior.
Missing deprecation note on AggregationCursor.each in docs; documentation fix only.
SDAM rewrite failed to follow spec rules for 'not master' and 'node is recovering' errors; description links to spec section.
GridFS read stream emits last chunk after close event; Node.js stream event ordering bug, no GridFS spec rule on event sequence.
Description states spec indicates no default batchSize value should be sent; driver sends 1 instead.
Promise swallows error that callback surfaces; async error-propagation bug, no spec rule violated.
Misleading deprecation warning text for SDAM engine option; UX/docs fix, no spec behavior.
Documentation improvement for createIndexes usage; docs task, no spec behavior change.
Create JSDoc typedef for readConcern; documentation task only.
Cannot connect to replica set via Unix socket; connection-string edge case, no specific spec rule identified.
replaceOne() returns replacement doc in undocumented ops array; docs/unexpected behavior, no CRUD spec rule on ops array.
Documentation task about concurrent cursor usage; no spec behavior involved.
SSL option name case mismatch passPhrase vs passphrase; internal API inconsistency, no spec rule on option naming.
Documentation improvement for cursor batchSize; docs task only.
Documentation clarification on batchSize unit; docs task only.
Add Node 12 to Travis CI matrix; CI configuration, no driver behavior.

Remove unused survey link from tutorials; documentation cleanup only.
Documentation for bulk operation methods; docs task, no spec behavior.

Documentation for Connection class options; docs task, no spec behavior.
